context: Pillar 3 pilot — foreign equity limits: Qualified Foreign Law Firm scheme caps foreign equity/voting rights at 40% in International Partnerships
Pillar 3 pilot — joint venture requirement: upstream petroleum operations must be conducted via Production Sharing Contract/Joint Operating Agreement with PETRONAS
Pillar 3 pilot — nationality/residency requirement: at least one director ordinarily resident in Singapore
Pillar 3 pilot — investment screening: FIRB mandatory notification/approval regime for foreign acquisitions above thresholds
Pillar 3 pilot — commercial presence requirement: foreign insurers must operate via a locally incorporated subsidiary
Pillar 8 pilot — safe harbour for copyright infringement: Part 9 network service provider limitation-of-remedies regime
Pillar 8 pilot — safe harbour for other (non-copyright) illegal activities: s.10 general network service provider liability limitation for third-party material

lawName: Communications and Multimedia Act 1998 — Mandatory Standard on Registration of Prepaid SIM End Users
context: Pillar 8 pilot — user identity requirement: mandatory prepaid SIM card registration with biometric/document identity verification, issued under ss.55 and 104(1)(b) CMA 1998
Pillar 8 pilot — monitoring requirements: Basic Online Safety Expectations determination for platform providers
